reviews.review_description: I just came out of tutorial and a moderator came out and told me to change my name as I was walking to it but then proceeds to follow me around like harassing me forcing me to change my name or I was going to get banned and I told him I'll do I'm going to write a bad review because of how horrible he was towards me

developer_response.body:
1. When you join a gorilla tag copy the first thing a staff will tell you to do is to change you're name

2. before you do a bad review maybe get in contact with a higher rank then a normal mod

3. No Moderator Can Ban You Unless They Are Granted Ban Perms

4. If you are not banned don't complain.

reviews.review_title: The mods are actually so sensitive.
reviews.review_description: A mod banned me cause I made a joke and the joke wasn't even bad, and this dude was so sensitive that he banned be for basically no reason I was "GORILLAGT" in city, so to the mod who banned me over a joke, your actually so sensitive and I hope you get your mod powers taken away, abusing your mods over a joke that wasn't even that bad is insane!.

developer_response.body:
Sorry for what happened to you while playing the game,  please reach out to an owner or a higher rank then T-mod or Moderator

- Review Closed

reviews.review_description: I jumped down from tutorial and was greeted by 6 players yelling at me to change my name one of them saying they were a mod and I would get banned if I didn’t change my name. A couple of hours ago I went into a lobby and some kid kept saying he was the co-owner, and said he was going to ban me if I wasn’t nice to him, he also called me a slur. I reported him and sent a video into the discord only for the co-owner to reply saying it was his little brother playing on the co-owners account with the ability to ban people, the co owner also stated that he was monitoring his little brother and he never said the slur—in the video you can  clearly hear his little brother saying it. Personally I think this game isn’t managed well and the staff team is way too young,. I have seen a few reviews on this game referencing the same type of deal, it’s always the staff team.

I jumped down from tutorial and a moderater told told me to to change my name so I created a name and the moderater said I’m going to report you and I got banned for 48 hours.


Yall need to stop doing this because it seems like every body is having the same problem


Yall need new staff members

developer_response.body: Sorry for the Problem, i am the game creator Pinkoo I Own Everything About This Game And Wanted To Reach Out and Say i Will Take Action On The Staff Team Problem!

reviews.review_description:
I went on my brothers account and when I came down from turtorial this guy with a banana hat reported me and said change your name I think he was a mod but when I went to change my name I got banned for 48 hours

Edit: You said I attempted to leave the lobby and when I was on my brothers acc Yall said change your name I said ok ok I don’t wanna get banned on this acc and I was changing my name 

I got banned again for lifting the middle finger as a joke what kind of game is this!!?! Yall need new staff and there able to fly tag but not us yoy guys suck! Am gonna try to get gtag to see this game and shut it down

developer_response.body:
You Attempted To Leave The Lobby After Being Told.

- Review Closed.

developer_response.body:
False Information
Got Banned With Reason: Spammed Name, Avoiding to change name.
